title: Transmission of zoonotic TB from animals to humans
body: "This rapid systematic review summarised evidence on the risk of transmitting Mycobacterium tuberculosis complex species including M. bovis, M. caprae, M. microti, M. orygis, and M. TB from animals to humans.  This rapid systematic review searched for research published up to 12 November 2024. Two cohort, 7 cross-sectional, and 7 case-control studies were identified for inclusion.  "
